\tzpentry{ID4158}{Quantum Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4158 introduces Quantum Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} H_{\text{quantum}} = H_{\text{classical}} + \frac{\hbar^2}{2mk_BT}\sum_i p_i|\nabla\log p_i|^2 \end{equation}
